aleabit.thesis: Inspur is the AI server, not a chokepoint behind it. Layer 1 terminal AI at >$13B mcap with the entire street covering it — this is exactly what the framework calls crowded terminal AI. SOE structure, government customer concentration, and zero insider buying make it a beta-to-AI-capex name, not a bottleneck trade.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: It IS the assembly point, not a choke supplier into one

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: Integration moat is real but commoditized vs upstream

signals.name: 政府/国防关联
signals.note: On US Entity List — export control matters but cuts both ways

signals.name: CEO 二级市场买入
signals.note: SOE — open-market CEO buying does not apply

aleabit.ai_relevance: Maximum theme exposure, minimum chokepoint angle.
